name_cn:
Premium Grade, High Version
 Gold Check Small Size
DIOR Book Tote Shopping Bag
Larger than the mini size, slightly smaller than the original small size
The retro D-letter embroidery that swept the fashion world
Full handmade 3D embroidery, textured and detailed
Rich retro artistic atmosphere, simply a walking work of art
Super large capacity, highly recommended
Especially suitable for girls who want to take their whole home out
Mom bag, briefcase, travel companion
A must-have for fashionistas to create their look
26.5×21×14cm
